description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that publishes Python distributions to PyPI and TestPyPI on push. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository, fetch tags, set up Python 3.7, install pep517, build a source tarball, and then publish the distribution to TestPyPI and PyPI using pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish, authenticating with secrets.test_pypi_password and secrets.pypi_password respectively.
